assets.description: Side-by-side PowerShell (left, primary) and Bash (right, alternate) panel showing the 6 exchanges: write short notes.txt, dump with cat, build a 30-line notes-long.txt, open with more/less, quit with q, clean up
PNG render of the same 6-exchange side-by-side panel, showing the pager row with -- More -- (PowerShell) and : (Bash) markers

Typewriter animation of the 6-exchange PowerShell-primary walkthrough including the pager-open row, the quit-with-q row, and the final cleanup. Rendered with a 48-colour adaptive palette and typing_step=2
PowerShell-first screen-reader transcript with the full pager output, the quit-with-q note, and the pager-behaviour difference between Windows more.com and Bash less
